description_long: This is a cylindrical metal trash bin with a slightly tapered body and a flat, removable lid. The surface has a weathered, galvanized steel appearance, giving it a utilitarian and durable look suitable for outdoor urban environments. Two external, top-mounted handles are attached to the sides of the bin, allowing for easy lifting and removal of the lid. The lid features a central, rectangular handle for convenient access. The bin is unmarked, with no visible signage or labeling, and does not have any wheels for mobility. Its robust construction and classic design make it ideal for use on sidewalks, in parks, or near garages.
description: A cylindrical, galvanized metal trash bin with a flat removable lid and external top-mounted handles, unmarked and wheel-less.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat lid with a central handle and the smooth, weathered metal surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one of the external, top-mounted handles attached to the bin's rim.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the lid and body visible but no handle in direct view.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the second external, top-mounted handle, mirroring view 1.
